implemented: AgentEvent and JSON reference host adapters
production configuration and SHA-256 release integrity manifest
finding: The runtime reproduced all 20 untouched offline route decisions, passed warm and sustained-load latency budgets, survived restart deterministically, contained injected crashes, and restored the prior checkpoint through rollback.
decision: Promote Tessera v0.3.0 to local production candidate while preserving external launch blockers.
external_launch_blockers: two genuinely independent external host integrations
independent security review and dependency vulnerability scan
independent reproducibility run in a clean environment
non_claim_lock: Local production candidacy does not prove external production readiness, general safety, natural failure sensitivity, consciousness, or autonomous authority.
